'''thayuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiggambob|jiggambob]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiggambob|jiggambob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thayuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyichith|thæyichith]] || [[word:thæyichij|thæyichij]] || [[word:thæyichish|thæyichish]] || [[word:thæyichi|thæyichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayuyuchuth|thayuyuchuth]] || [[word:thayuyuchuj|thayuyuchuj]] || [[word:thayuyuchush|thayuyuchush]] || [[word:thayuyuchu|thayuyuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayuchuth|thayuchuth]] || [[word:thayuchuj|thayuchuj]] || [[word:thayuchush|thayuchush]] || [[word:thayuchu|thayuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayufchuth|thayufchuth]] || [[word:thayufchuj|thayufchuj]] || [[word:thayufchush|thayufchush]] || [[word:thayufchuf|thayufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayuchuthu|thayuchuthu]] || [[word:thayuchuju|thayuchuju]] || [[word:thayuchushu|thayuchushu]] || [[word:thayuchuku|thayuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayuchuth|thayuchuth]] || [[word:thayuchuj|thayuchuj]] || [[word:thayuchush|thayuchush]] || [[word:thayuchu|thayuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayuchuthul|thayuchuthul]] || [[word:thayuchujul|thayuchujul]] || [[word:thayuchushul|thayuchushul]] || [[word:thayuchukul|thayuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayuchuthuthu|thayuchuthuthu]] || [[word:thayuchujuju|thayuchujuju]] || [[word:thayuchushushu|thayuchushushu]] || [[word:thayuchuku|thayuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayuchuthun|thayuchuthun]] || [[word:thayuchujun|thayuchujun]] || [[word:thayuchushun|thayuchushun]] || [[word:thayuchukun|thayuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayuchuthuoro|thayuchuthuoro]] || [[word:thayuchujuoro|thayuchujuoro]] || [[word:thayuchushuoro|thayuchushuoro]] || [[word:thayuchukuoro|thayuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
